recommendations.title: Donnie Brasco
recommendations.overview: An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and identifies more with the mafia life at the expense of his regular one.

recommendations.title: Four Weddings and a Funeral
recommendations.overview: Over the course of five social occasions, a committed bachelor must consider the notion that he may have discovered love.

recommendations.title: The Guernsey Literary & Potato Peel Pie Society
recommendations.overview: Free-spirited writer Juliet Ashton forms a life-changing bond with the delightful and eccentric Guernsey Literary and Potato Peel Pie Society, when she decides to write about the book club they formed during the occupation of Guernsey in WWII.

recommendations.title: Pushing Tin
recommendations.overview: Two air traffic controllers who thrive on living dangerously compete to outdo each other on several levels.

recommendations.title: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

recommendations.title: Love in the Time of Cholera
recommendations.overview: In Colombia just after the Great War, an old man falls from a ladder; dying, he professes great love for his wife. After the funeral, a man calls on the widow - she dismisses him angrily. Flash back more than 50 years to the day Florentino Ariza, a t

recommendations.title: Great Expectations
recommendations.overview: Orphan Pip discovers through lawyer Mr. Jaggers that a mysterious benefactor wishes to ensure that he becomes a gentleman. Reunited with his childhood patron, Miss Havisham, and his first love, the beautiful but emotionally cold Estella, he discovers

recommendations.title: Firebrand
recommendations.overview: Katherine Parr, the sixth wife of King Henry VIII, is named regent while the tyrant battles abroad. When the king returns, increasingly ill and paranoid, Katherine finds herself fighting for her own survival.

recommendations.title: Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time
recommendations.overview: A rogue prince reluctantly joins forces with a mysterious princess and together, they race against dark forces to safeguard an ancient dagger capable of releasing the Sands of Time – gift from the gods that can reverse time and allow its possessor to

recommendations.title: Hidden Figures
recommendations.overview: The untold story of Katherine G. Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson – brilliant African-American women working at NASA and serving as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history – the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit.
